message:
feat(session): add branch-local model and thinking-level state with navigation sync

Core session changes (session.rs, +688 lines):
- Add fallback_provider, fallback_model_id, fallback_thinking_level,
  and current_leaf fields to SessionHeader for branch-local state
- New effective_model_for_current_path() and
  effective_thinking_level_for_current_path() methods that walk the
  current branch tree instead of relying on shared header fields
- Navigation methods (navigate_to, reset_leaf, revert_last_turn,
  apply_compaction_plan) now sync header metadata to the active branch
  state after switching
- Session save uses header.cwd for project session directory instead
  of env::current_dir(), making saves deterministic across working dirs
- Extensive tests for round-trip serialization, branch navigation state
  transitions, and legacy session backward compatibility

RPC and SDK updates (rpc.rs, sdk.rs):
- session_thinking_level() and current_model_entry() now delegate to
  branch-aware session methods instead of reading raw header fields
- set_thinking_level() uses effective_model_for_current_path() and
  effective_thinking_level_for_current_path()

Test infrastructure (session_conformance.rs):
- Add new header fields to proptest strategy for fuzz coverage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
